title: CPU_MEDIUM and CPU_LARGE workload types for Model Serving (Beta)
body: The `CPU_MEDIUM` and `CPU_LARGE` workload types for [Model Serving](/aws/en/machine-learning/model-serving) are now in [Beta](/aws/en/release-notes/release-types). These workload types let you trade concurrency for more memory per worker on the same CPU hardware. Use them when your model needs more memory than the standard `CPU` workload type provides. See [Compute type](/aws/en/machine-learning/model-serving/custom-models#compute-type).
